title: Solutions & Policy Options Center
purpose: Present a structured, evidence-based exploration of proposals advanced to address issues related to Citizens United — distinguishing existing law, proposed reforms, and educational analysis.
principle: Educate readers about the range of policy approaches, who has authority to pursue each, and the legal or constitutional considerations — without advocacy.

authority_levels.title: Federal Action
authority_levels.description: Congress, federal agencies, constitutional amendment process

authority_levels.title: State Action
authority_levels.description: State legislatures, ballot initiatives, state constitutions, ethics commissions

authority_levels.title: Constitutional Amendment
authority_levels.description: Article V process — federal or state-led convention paths

authority_levels.title: Private-Sector / Institutional
authority_levels.description: Shareholder governance, corporate policy, nonprofit education

authority_levels.title: Community / Civic
authority_levels.description: Education, forums, local leadership — no legislation required

authority_levels.title: Litigation
authority_levels.description: Court challenges testing boundaries of existing precedent

sections.title: Federal Policy Options
sections.question: What could happen at the federal level?
topics: Election administration proposals related to campaign finance
proposal_fields: What problem it seeks to address

share_tool.title: Share With Your U.S. Representative and Senators
share_tool.description: Provide educational resources to federal elected officials.

arkansas.title: Arkansas General Assembly
arkansas.description: Dedicated section on the Arkansas legislative process and educational materials shareable with state legislators.

share_tool.title: Share With Your State Legislators
share_tool.description: Send educational resources to members of the Arkansas General Assembly.

sections.title: Community Solutions
sections.question: What can citizens do without legislation?
sections.emphasis: Expanding public understanding through education — not every response requires legislation.

comparison_matrix.title: Solutions Comparison Matrix
comparison_matrix.description: Every proposal compared using a consistent educational framework.
columns: Mechanism required (legislation, regulation, constitutional amendment, litigation, private action)

civic_engagement_tools.title: Share with local civic organizations & educators
Invite others to explore the platform

platform_role: Provide accurate educational resources that readers may choose to share with public officials and their communities as part of informed civic participation.
